messages.pending: Your boat has sent data to PostgSail yet, things should be fine when she comes back online
messages.offline: Your boat has been offline since {0} but it is configured for PostgSail, things should be fine when she comes back online
messages.online: Your boat is online, last data received {0}
messages.plugin_version: You are running an older version of PostgSail plugin. Please upgrade to the latest version
messages.monitoring: Monitoring configuration changes will apply automatically on your boat however it may take several minutes. Please ensure your device is online.

token_modal.title: MCP token
token_modal.details: This MCP token provides AI agents with read-only access to your PostgSail marine data systems.
token_modal.message: Copy paste this token into PostgSail MCP server.

pushover.link: Verknüpfen Sie Ihr Pushover-Konto, um es zu aktivieren
pushover.connected: Ihr Benutzer ist mit Pushover verbunden.

telegram_bot.link: Fügen Sie den PostgSail-Bot einer Gruppe oder einem Direktchat hinzu.

msg.website: Website displayed alongside your stats, please enter the full URL starting with http:// or https://
msg.instagram_handle: Instagram link displayed alongside your stats, please enter without a leading {'@'} sign
msg.theme: Choose your preferred theme for the PostgSail interface. You can select Light, Dark, or Auto mode which adjusts based on your system settings.
msg.preferred_homepage: Choose the page you want to see after you login to PostgSail
msg.use_imperial_units: When enabled, your statistics and monitoring will be displayed using imperial units (e.g. °F, ft, kts) instead of metric units (e.g. °C, m, km/h).
msg.language: Choose your preferred language for the PostgSail interface.
msg.email_notifications: E-mail Notifications allow you to receive updates and alerts about your boat's activities, logs, and monitoring data directly to your inbox. You stay informed about important events related to your vessel.
msg.phone_notifications: Enabling phone notifications allows you to receive real-time alerts about important events and conditions related to your boat. This feature helps you stay informed and take timely action to ensure the safety and performance of your vessel.
msg.public_profile_info: Enabling your public profile allows you to share your sailing adventures and boat information with the world. You can choose to make specific details like your logs, stats, timelapse, and monitoring data publicly accessible. This way, you can connect with other sailors, share your experiences, and even inspire others with your journeys on the water.
msg.phone_notifications_info: Enabling phone notifications allows you to receive real-time alerts about important events and conditions related to your boat. This feature helps you stay informed and take timely action to ensure the safety and performance of your vessel.
msg.alerting: Alerting allows you to set up custom thresholds for various parameters such as wind speed, temperature, pressure, battery charge, and more. When any of these parameters exceed the defined thresholds, you will receive notifications on your phone or via email, helping you stay proactive in managing your boat's performance and safety.
msg.alerting_enabled: Alerting is enabled. You will receive notifications when any of your defined thresholds are exceeded.
msg.alerting_info: Alerting allows you to set up custom thresholds for various parameters such as wind speed, temperature, pressure, battery charge, and more. When any of these parameters exceed the defined thresholds, you will receive notifications on your phone or via email, helping you stay proactive in managing your boat's performance and safety.
msg.pushover: Pushover is a service that allows you to receive real-time notifications on your phone or desktop. By linking your Pushover account, you can get instant alerts about important events and conditions related to your boat, helping you stay informed and take timely action.
msg.telegram_bot: Telegram is a messaging app that allows you to receive real-time notifications on your phone or desktop. By connecting your Telegram account to PostgSail, you can get instant alerts about important events and conditions related to your boat, helping you stay informed and take timely action.
msg.sponsor_thank_you: Thank you for sponsoring PostgSail! Your support helps us continue to develop and improve the platform, making it even better for sailors around the world. We truly appreciate your contribution to your sailing community!
msg.password_protected: When enabled, you will be required to enter your password to access your public data. This adds an extra layer of security to protect your personal information.
msg.windy_station: Windy station identifier as displayed in Windy URL after /station/pws- (e.g. d06efc48)
msg.public_profile: When enabled, corresponding pages like stats, timelapse and others can be accessed by anyone without being required to login or password protected. It is a read-only mode.
msg.public_logs: When enabled, your individual log details will be publicly accessible at https://iot.openplotter.cloud/{0}{1}/log/{0}
msg.public_stats: When enabled, your statistics will be publicly accessible at https://iot.openplotter.cloud/{0}/stats
msg.public_logs_list: When enabled, list of all your logs will be publicly accessible at https://iot.openplotter.cloud/{0}/logs
msg.public_timelapse: When enabled, your timelapse will be publicly accessible at https://iot.openplotter.cloud/{0}/timelapse
msg.public_monitoring: When enabled, your monitoring will be publicly accessible at https://iot.openplotter.cloud/{0}/monitoring
msg.public_name: When you enable your public profile, you will have the option to choose your boat name
msg.public_windy: When you enable your public profile, you will have the option to transform your boat in a weather station integrate in Windy.
msg.mcp_integration: Allows AI agents integration in a secure (read-only) and standardized way. When using PostgSail MCP server, you can enable advanced functionalities that enhance the capabilities of your marine data systems, making it easier to manage and optimize your boating experience.

monitoring.message: You can monitor all data available on your boat network using PostgSail. Monitoring data sources can be organized into sections based on shared characteristics, such as measurement units. For instance, a 'Tanks' section could group together data sources for Freshwater, Wastewater, and Fuel, providing a structured and intuitive overview. You can add as many sections as you would like.

offline.offline: Ihr Schiff ist offline. Echtzeitüberwachung erfordert eine Internetverbindung.
offline.lastupdate: Wir haben innerhalb der letzten 70 Minuten keine Daten von Ihrem Sammler erhalten.

explore.title: Explore Data
explore.msg: List of paths and value gather from SignalK and use to process logs, stays, moorages, maps and monitoring

badges.Helmsman: Gute Arbeit, dass du deine erste Segelfahrt protokolliert hast! Du bist jetzt offiziell ein Steuermann!
badges.Wake Maker: Willkommen im Club der 15-Knoten-Plus, du Geschwindigkeitsdämon Skipper!
badges.Explorer: Es sieht so aus, als wäre das Zuhause, wo das Steuer ist. Prost auf 10 Tage fern der Heimat!
badges.Mooring Pro: Es erfordert viel Geschick, um "durch dieses schwebende Nadelöhr zu stechen", aber es sieht so aus, als hättest du das Anlegen mit 10 Nächten auf der Boje gemeistert!
badges.Anchormaster: Haken, Leine und Senker, du hast das Ankern im Griff! 25 Tage vor Anker für dich!
badges.Traveler: Wer muss fliegen, wenn man segeln kann! Du bist ein internationaler Segler. À votre santé!
badges.Stormtrooper: Genau wie die Eliteverteidiger des Imperiums, hier bist du, der seine eigene Hydro-Empire in Windgeschwindigkeiten über 30 Knoten bravourös meistert. Gut gemacht, Trooper!
badges.Club Alaska: Heimat der Bären, Gletscher, Mitternachtssonne und hohem Abenteuer. Willkommen im Club Alaska, Kapitän!
badges.Tropical Traveler: Schau dich an mit deinem Sonnenbrand, tropischen Getränk und südlichem Breitengrad!
badges.Aloha Award: Über 2300 Seemeilen über den großen blauen Pazifik zu ticken, macht dich zum seltenen Empfänger des Aloha Award. Gut gemacht und Aloha, Segler!
badges.Navigator Award: Juhu! Du hast es geschafft, über 100 Seemeilen auf einmal abzuhaken. Gut gemacht, Segler!
badges.Captain Award: Herzlichen Glückwunsch, du hast über 1000 Seemeilen erreicht. Gut gemacht, Segler!

important_note.title: Wichtiger Hinweis
important_note.message: PostgSail Cloud ist Open Source und kostenlos für den persönlichen Gebrauch mit einem einzelnen Schiff. Um mehrere Boote zu verwalten, kontaktieren Sie uns bitte. Sie können öffentliche oder private Flotten für Ihre Freunde, Segelvereine, Yachtclubs oder Flotillen erstellen. Für weitere Informationen kontaktieren Sie uns unter
